note: Curated list of utility pages surfaced by show-repo's Tools view (lib/alpineComponents/tools.js). Hand-maintained, a sibling to pins and stage.files, not generated. Each entry is { path, title, note, icon }; path is a bare hub path (mehrlander/web-tools at main) or a qualified cross-repo ref (owner/repo[@ref]:path), the same grammar as a pages catalog entry.

items.title: Transform
items.note: Row transform with a brotli/gz bundle round-trip.

items.title: Shorter
items.note: Adjudicate a shorter draft against your text, word-diffed.

items.title: Gist Editor
items.note: Browse and edit GitHub gists in the browser.

items.title: Repo Atlas
items.note: Zoomable treemap of any GitHub repo.
